query:
INSERT INTO person_task (
                    uuid,
                    person_uuid,
                    content,
                    state,
                    success_condition,
                    abandon_condition,
                    failure_condition,
                    priority
                )
                VALUES (
                    $1::UUID,
                    $2::UUID,
                    $3::TEXT,
                    $4::TEXT,
                    $5::TEXT,
                    $6::TEXT,
                    $7::TEXT,
                    $8::INTEGER
                );
